[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01000010 2
1 11111011 7
2 01100101 4
3 11111111 a
4 01000101 3
5 01011010 4
6 11111011 7
7 01100101 4

01 00000010 1
12 00011101 4
23 00000000 a
34 10011010 4
45 01000101 3 match 4
56 10100000 2
67 00000000 a
70 00001000 1

02 00010101 3
13 00000100 1
24 00000010 1
35 01010011 4

57 10100000 2
60 00001000 1
71 00000000 a

03 00000100 1
14 00011000 2

50 10101000 3
61 00000000 a
